channel.title: RSS on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in RSS on yexca'Blog

item.title: RSS
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Introduction I first encountered RSS back when I was browsing HACG. By the time I actually understood it, RSS was already on the decline. Projects like RSSHub were keeping the flame alive, but I eventually gave up on it due to frequent connection issues. However, as I’ve discovered more blogs, I’ve returned to RSS to stay updated and keep track of what I’ve read.
